opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg is swollen, burning hot, and hurts to walk on, and I've been shivering with a fever all afternoon.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The redness on my lower leg has been spreading really fast up towards my knee over the last few hours and now I've come over feverish and shivery, so my wife wanted me to get seen tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: I got what looked like an insect bite on my right shin about two days ago; the redness around it started spreading fast about 12 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: the redness has been spreading for about 12 hours and the fever and shivering came on in the last 4 hours
symptom_narrative.character: the skin is red, hot, tight and shiny, and it's very tender — it hurts a lot to touch or to stand on
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really painful, and I feel wiped out and unwell all over
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right lower leg, from the ankle up to about the middle of my calf
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it has been getting worse steadily, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — resting with the leg down hasn't helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing on it or touching it, and it just keeps spreading upward on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: high fever, chills and shivering, and feeling generally unwell and drained
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can normally get around fine but right now I can barely put any weight on that leg

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with spouse, who is with him and made the call; normally independent and fully mobile

objective_data_offered.value: 38.8 degrees on our home thermometer this afternoon
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a household thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: the right lower leg is red and swollen from the ankle up to about mid-calf; the skin looks tight, shiny and dimpled like orange peel, and there is a small scabbed insect bite on the shin
spouse says he looks flushed and sweaty and has been shivering, and that the red area has crept noticeably higher up the leg since the afternoon
